title: Free Online Workshop: Cultivating Peace Through Creating
excerpt: I had such a fun time at the last free live workshop we had that I wanted to do another one! Join me on Thursday, September 3rd, 4 pm PST for Cultivating Peace Through Creating! Do you feel stuck in…
body:
I had such a fun time at the last free live workshop we had that I wanted to do another one!

Join me on Thursday, September 3rd, 4 pm PST for Cultivating Peace Through Creating!

   

Do you feel stuck in a creative rut? Are your spirits weighed down by present circumstances? Do you need some fresh inspiration? In this free LIVE online mini workshop, I'll be sharing my tips for getting those creative juices flowing again and demonstrating how to cultivate a sense of peace during chaotic times in my traveler's notebook! 

Don't worry if you can't make the live workshop - we'll be sending out a replay link!

Hope to see you there! 

Sign up
